subject: FW: Spam: For Mr. Jeffrey Epstein-NO END IN SIGHT
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Lesley Groff 
Sent: Tuesday, December 11, 2007 8:56 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: Spam: For Mr. Jeffrey Epstein-NO END IN SIGHT



-----Original Message-----
From: Peggy Siegal [mailto:peggy@peggysiegal.com] 
Sent: Monday, December 10, 2007 11:44 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Spam: For Mr. Jeffrey Epstein-NO END IN SIGHT

  <http://rs6.net/on.jsp?t=1101906290615.0.1101430287919.1189&ts=S0305&o=http://ui.constantcontact.com/images/p1x1.gif> 
HENRY LOUIS GATES, JR.
RICK HERTZBERG   MICHAEL KENNEDY
PETER OSNOS      DARLENE RODRIGUEZ
 
CORDIALLY INVITE YOU TO JOIN
 
CHARLES FERGUSON
&
MARC GARLASCO
SR. MILITARY ANALYST, HUMAN RIGHTS WATCH
 
AT A SPECIAL SCREENING OF 
 
MAGNOLIA PICTURES
NO END IN SIGHT
WRITTEN AND DIRECTED BY CHARLES FERGUSON
 
WINNER DOCUMENTARY SPECIAL JURY PRIZE SUNDANCE FILM FESTIVAL 2007
 
MONDAY, DECEMBER 17, 2007
            
7:00PM SCANDINAVIA HOUSE
58 PARK AVENUE
 
9:00PM THE HOTEL PLAZA ATHENEE
37 EAST 64TH STREET
 
PEGGY@PEGGYSIEGAL.COM OR 212-935-6700
THIS INVITATION IS NON-TRANSFERABLE
The first film of its kind to chronicle the reasons behind Iraqs descent into guerilla war, warlord rule, criminality and anarchy, NO END IN SIGHT is a jaw-dropping, insiders tale of wholesale incompetence, recklessness and venality. Based on over 200 hours of footage, the film provides a candid retelling of the events following the fall of Baghdad in 2003 by high ranking officials such as Former Deputy Secretary of State Richard Armitage, Ambassador Barbara Bodine (in charge of Baghdad during the Spring of 2003), Lawrence Wilkerson, former Chief of Staff to Colin Powell, and General Jay Garner (in charge of the occupation of Iraq through May 2003) as well as Iraqi civilians, American soldiers, and prominent analysts. NO END IN SIGHT examines the manner in which the principal errors of U.S. policy the use of insufficient troop levels, allowing the looting of Baghdad, the purging of professionals from the Iraqi government, and the disbanding of the Iraqi military largely created the insurgency and chaos that engulf Iraq today. 
 
NO END IN SIGHT dissects the people, issues and facts behind the Bush Administrations decisions and their consequences on the ground to provide a powerful look into how arrogance and ignorance turned a military victory into a seemingly endless and deepening nightmare of a war.      It marks the first time Americans will be allowed inside the White House, Pentagon and Baghdads Green Zone to understand for themselves what has become the disintegration of Iraq. 
 
 

 <http://visitor.constantcontact.com/d.jsp?p=un&v=0016DNjNiidDhR5-hLIXFRFoKynI9wK9QlvRLRPgLQitY0bJp862KZUlp6mhvsIkgVEYfEzwKLfIMIRkFzQ9WPfPA%3D%3D>  
This email was sent to lesley@nysgllc.com, by peggy@peggysiegal.com
Update Profile/Email Address <http://visitor.constantcontact.com/d.jsp?p=oo&v=0016DNjNiidDhR5-hLIXFRFoKynI9wK9QlvRLRPgLQitY0bJp862KZUlp6mhvsIkgVEYfEzwKLfIMIRkFzQ9WPfPA%3D%3D>  | Instant removal with SafeUnsubscribe <http://visitor.constantcontact.com/d.jsp?p=un&v=0016DNjNiidDhR5-hLIXFRFoKynI9wK9QlvRLRPgLQitY0bJp862KZUlp6mhvsIkgVEYfEzwKLfIMIRkFzQ9WPfPA%3D%3D> ™ | Privacy Policy <http://ui.constantcontact.com/roving/CCPrivacyPolicy.jsp> .
	

Peggy Siegal | 4 West 58th Street | mezzanine | New York | NY | 10019
